name: Tisdale Clean Energy Corp.
description: Terra Clean Energy Corp. (formerly Tisdale Clean Energy Corp.) is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of uranium projects across North America. The company maintains a diversified portfolio of assets in Tier-1 jurisdictions, including the South Falcon East project in Saskatchewan's Athabasca Basin and historic, past-producing mines in Utah's Marysvale Uranium District. By targeting high-grade uranium resources and leveraging existing infrastructure, Terra Clean Energy aims to address the growing demand for domestic nuclear fuel and support long-term energy independence in the United States.
